game_name: Spider-Man and the X-Men in Arcade's Revenge

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns Spider-Man swinging and basic navigation before capture
Establishes narrative stakes; motivates entering first stage
Tutorial-like ordered deactivation mechanic guided by Spider-Sense

element_introduction_order.first_appears: After Stage 1, player selects first hero event
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Each hero has two events; first event unlocks second event progression

element_introduction_order.element: Shared lives system across all heroes
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Single character death impacts entire team; creates resource pressure
Increasingly complex obstacle sequences specific to each hero's abilities
Accessible only after mastering all preceding character stages

typical_relief_triggers: Completing a hero's first event to unlock progression
Transitioning between character stages via free selection
Successful deactivation of security eyes in correct order
typical_tension_triggers: Shared lives mechanic - one character death threatens all heroes
Attempting hero-specific themed death trap events
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Graduated escalation with character selection breaks; tension maintained through shared resource pressure (collective lives); cumulative difficulty as more events completed

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-style Security Eyes puzzle introduces core mechanics; Spider-Man narrative framing eases player into Murderworld concept
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Character-specific hero events increase in complexity; shared lives system creates escalating pressure; players must master multiple character mechanics
difficulty_curve.late_game: Later hero events feature more complex Murderworld traps; final Arcade battle as ultimate challenge after completing all hero progressions
notable_spikes: Transition from Stage 1 to character event selection
Moving from first to second event per character (second events locked behind first completion)
Final Arcade boss battle requiring mastery of all hero mechanics

notable_level_patterns.description: Stage 1 security puzzle must be solved before accessing hero event selection; subsequent hero second-events locked behind first-event completion
Each hero has two distinct themed events within Murderworld; players can choose first event order but must complete both for progression
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Cyclops, Storm, Wolverine, Gambit paired events

notable_level_patterns.description: All heroes share single lives pool; losing any character damages team resource; forces skillful play across all character types

sources_used: wikipedia - Spider-Man and the X-Men in Arcade's Revenge
